basic_details.job_title: Rajasthan RPSC RAS Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 607 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC), Ajmer has released an official advertisement for 607 posts under the Rajasthan State Services and Subordinate Services Combined Competitive Examination 2026.

important_dates.preliminary examination schedule: To be notified on the official RPSC website
important_dates.main examination schedule: To be notified after Preliminary Examination results

application_fee.details: Fee is payable online on the RPSC website: https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in. Candidates from other states belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS categories will be treated as General category and must pay General category fee.

age_limit.details: General Age Limit: Minimum 21 years and maximum 40 years as on January 1, 2027. For Rajasthan Government departmental candidates: minimum age 25 years as on January 1, 2027, but must not have crossed 45 years.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and experience specified in the advertisement: | Minimum Qualification: Must hold a Degree from any University incorporated by an Act of the Central or State Legislature in India, or other Educational Institution established by an Act of Parliament, or declared to be a deemed University under Section 3 of the UGC Act, 1956, or possess an equivalent qualification recognized by the Government in consultation with the Commission. Note: Candidates who do not possess the required educational qualification (educational qualification, experience, and age) at the time of filling the online application must withdraw their application through the Commission's website. Submitting a false/incorrect application is a punishable offense under Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 (BNS) Section 217, and can lead to debarment from all RPSC examinations for the next three years. | For State Services reserved posts for non-gazetted Rajasthan State Government employees: Candidate must have completed not less than 5 years of service (whether officiating or substantive) as on January 1, 2027.

salary_details.21: Rajasthan State Agricultural Marketing Service (Marketing Officer)
salary_details.22: Rajasthan Social Justice & Empowerment Subordinate Service - District Probation & Social Welfare Officer (SA)
salary_details.25: Rajasthan Minority Affairs Subordinate Service - Programme Officer (NSA)
salary_details.26: Rajasthan Subordinate Service - State Agricultural Marketing Department (Junior Marketing Officer)
salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding all vacancy packages are as follows:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online registration process as follows:

Visit the RPSC official website: https://rpsc.rajasthan.gov.in and click the Apply Online link, or log in via the SSO Portal: https://sso.rajasthan.gov.in using Citizen Apps (G2C) to access the Recruitment Portal.

Complete One Time Registration (OTR) on the SSO portal if not already done. During OTR, keep a live photo of yourself, your name, father's name (if available on Aadhaar), date of birth, gender, Aadhaar/Janaadhar Card details ready.
Fill in the online application form completely and accurately with all educational qualification, experience, and category details as applicable on the last date of the notification.
